title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
